message: Got the trays cooling. Ratios are still wrong from yesterday - we're going back to basics before anyone adds anything cute to this.
You're right to strip it back - I was already thinking about how the filling ratio changes the whole story we're telling with this thing.
Margaret's right about the ratios - maybe we nail the filling-to-crust balance first, then we'll actually know what Marcus is working with?
Nailing the base first makes sense - once we know what the crust is doing, the filling can breathe instead of fighting for space.
Good. Test the crust alone first - three batches, different hydration levels, nothing else.
I like where this is headed - crust-first means we actually know what we're working with when the filling goes in.
